mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_relation (user_id, friend_id, deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN friend_relation fr ON u.id = fr.friend_id WHERE fr.user_id = #{userId} AND fr.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM friend_relation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM friend_relation WHERE ((user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}) OR (user_id = #{friendId} AND friend_id = #{userId})) AND deleted = 0
